flashcards.definition: Elements that are shiny, malleable, ductile, and good conductors; left/center of table.
Elements that are dull, brittle, poor conductors; upper right of table.
Elements with properties between metals and nonmetals (B, Si, Ge, As, Sb, Te, Po).
Group 1: highly reactive metals with 1 valence electron (Li, Na, K, etc.).
Group 18: very stable, unreactive gases with full valence shells (He, Ne, Ar, etc.).
